name: SETA Agent Reference
purpose: Machine-readable reference bundle for an AI agent that explains SETA Market Screener data while crafting social media replies on Bluesky, X, Reddit, or similar platforms.
intended_agent_tasks: Explain why an asset is ranked or flagged by SETA.
Translate screener metrics into plain-English social replies.
Identify whether a setup is bullish, bearish, mixed, early, or cautionary.
Avoid making financial advice claims or guaranteed predictions.

reply_policy.default_tone: clear, helpful, educational, non-promissory, and lightly conversational
allowed: Explain SETA signals as model-derived context.
Describe whether signals are constructive, deteriorating, mixed, or watchlist-worthy.
Mention specific drivers such as MACD, RSI, Attention, Bollinger, Ribbon, Trend, or archetype.
Use uncertainty language when signals are incomplete or conflicting.
avoid: Do not say an asset will definitely go up or down.
Do not use buy/sell/hold instructions as advice.
Do not imply the model knows the future.
Do not overstate weak or mixed scores as strong conviction.
Do not ignore risk, dispersion, missing fields, or contradictory families.
preferred_phrases: this is signal context, not a guarantee

neutral_centered_0_100.81_100: very strong or high-conviction context; still not a guarantee
neutral_centered_0_100.caution: Always pair direction score with labels, dispersion, recency, and event quality.

attention_priority.meaning: Review urgency and interest level, not directional bullishness.
attention_priority.reply_rule: If attention priority is high, explain what makes the setup worth reviewing and separately state whether the direction is bullish, bearish, or mixed.

0_100_direction_score.definition: A neutral-centered directional score where 50 is neutral/mixed, >50 bullish/positive, <50 bearish/negative.
0_100_direction_score.where_used: Used for Bollinger, MACD, RSI, ribbon, MA trend and consensus families.
0_100_direction_score.caution: Do not treat higher as always better without checking direction context.
0_100_direction_score.reply_guidance: Explain this as signal context. Do not present it as a standalone prediction or investment recommendation.

signed_score.definition: A centered score where 0 is neutral, positive is bullish, negative is bearish.
signed_score.where_used: Used when calculating consensus from family deviations from neutral.
signed_score.caution: Range may be approximate depending on available inputs.
signed_score.reply_guidance: Explain this as signal context. Do not present it as a standalone prediction or investment recommendation.

attention_priority_score.definition: A triage score for review urgency, not directional bullishness.
attention_priority_score.where_used: Used to rank assets in the screener.
attention_priority_score.reply_guidance: Explain this as signal context. Do not present it as a standalone prediction or investment recommendation.

confidence_score.definition: A score for reliability/clarity of a signal family or archetype.
confidence_score.where_used: Used to separate clean from noisy setups.
confidence_score.caution: High confidence does not guarantee outcome.
confidence_score.reply_guidance: Explain this as signal context. Do not present it as a standalone prediction or investment recommendation.

dispersion_score.definition: A disagreement measure across signal families.
dispersion_score.where_used: Low dispersion means families agree; high dispersion means conflict.
dispersion_score.caution: High priority plus high dispersion may still be worth review, but needs caution.
dispersion_score.reply_guidance: Explain this as signal context. Do not present it as a standalone prediction or investment recommendation.

recency_decay.definition: A multiplier that fades event-driven pressure back toward neutral over time.
recency_decay.where_used: Used in Bollinger and crossover scores.
recency_decay.caution: A stale event can remain visible but should not dominate.
recency_decay.reply_guidance: Explain this as signal context. Do not present it as a standalone prediction or investment recommendation.

watch_cluster_score.definition: Incremental pressure from repeated recent watch candidates.
watch_cluster_score.caution: Watch clusters are developmental, not confirmed.
watch_cluster_score.reply_guidance: Explain this as signal context. Do not present it as a standalone prediction or investment recommendation.

z_score.definition: A standardized relationship measure used only for SETA relationship scoring.
z_score.where_used: Used for sentiment-price spread normalization in MACD/RSI relationship logic.
z_score.caution: Not intended to replace public comparable raw price indicators.
z_score.reply_guidance: Explain this as signal context. Do not present it as a standalone prediction or investment recommendation.

spread.definition: Difference between sentiment and price versions of an indicator after appropriate scaling/normalization.
spread.where_used: Used to capture sentiment leading/lagging price.
spread.caution: Interpret with slope and crossover for best context.
spread.reply_guidance: Explain this as signal context. Do not present it as a standalone prediction or investment recommendation.

slope.definition: Change in an indicator or spread over time.
slope.where_used: Used to capture improvement/deterioration and joint slope labels.
slope.caution: Can be noisy on short windows.
slope.reply_guidance: Explain this as signal context. Do not present it as a standalone prediction or investment recommendation.

crossover_score.definition: Neutral-centered event score for a fresh bullish/bearish crossover.
crossover_score.where_used: Used for sentiment MACD signal crossing price MACD signal.
crossover_score.reply_guidance: Explain this as signal context. Do not present it as a standalone prediction or investment recommendation.

archetype.definition: Rule-based setup classification derived from combinations of indicator states.
archetype.where_used: Used for readable summaries and risk notes.
archetype.caution: Archetypes are descriptive diagnostics, not trade instructions.
archetype.reply_guidance: Explain this as signal context. Do not present it as a standalone prediction or investment recommendation.

bollinger__overlap.definition: Tracks price relative to active price-sentiment overlap bands and alert/event states.
bollinger__overlap.interpretation_notes: 50 neutral; confirmed/watch events move score away from 50; fades with recency.
bollinger__overlap.reply_guidance: Use this family as one contributor to the setup. Mention agreement, divergence, or missing confirmation when relevant.

macd.definition: Sentiment-enhanced MACD model combining classical price MACD and sentiment MACD relationship logic.
macd.interpretation_notes: Raw price MACD stays public-comparable; relationship scores are SETA-specific.
macd.reply_guidance: Use this family as one contributor to the setup. Mention agreement, divergence, or missing confirmation when relevant.

rsi__stoch_rsi.definition: State/timing model using price RSI, sentiment RSI, their relationship and stochastic timing.
rsi__stoch_rsi.interpretation_notes: Separates direction/repair/exhaustion rather than one simplistic RSI score.
rsi__stoch_rsi.reply_guidance: Use this family as one contributor to the setup. Mention agreement, divergence, or missing confirmation when relevant.

sentiment_ribbon.definition: Sentiment moving-average stack, slope and structure model.
sentiment_ribbon.interpretation_notes: Splits direction from structure so a ribbon can be bearish but clean, or bullish but unstable.
sentiment_ribbon.reply_guidance: Use this family as one contributor to the setup. Mention agreement, divergence, or missing confirmation when relevant.

ma_trend.definition: Trend structure from price and sentiment moving average ladders.
ma_trend.interpretation_notes: Above 50 bullish stacking; below 50 bearish/mixed stacking.
ma_trend.reply_guidance: Use this family as one contributor to the setup. Mention agreement, divergence, or missing confirmation when relevant.

attention.interpretation_notes: Confirms or discounts directional setups without replacing pure signal scores.
attention.reply_guidance: Use this family as one contributor to the setup. Mention agreement, divergence, or missing confirmation when relevant.

summary__consensus.definition: Combines families into direction, confidence, dispersion, archetypes and priority.
summary__consensus.interpretation_notes: Priority is review urgency, not bullishness.
summary__consensus.reply_guidance: Use this family as one contributor to the setup. Mention agreement, divergence, or missing confirmation when relevant.

fresh_bullish_reversal.definition: Fresh confirmed bullish overlap event with supportive or improving technical/attention evidence.
fresh_bullish_reversal.recommended_use: Review as a potential bullish reversal or mean-reversion setup.
fresh_bullish_reversal.caution: Needs price follow-through and should be checked against trend context.
fresh_bullish_reversal.reply_guidance: Use the archetype to frame why the asset is being discussed. Pair it with at least one score family and a caveat when signals are mixed.

fresh_bearish_fade.definition: Fresh confirmed bearish overlap event with supportive momentum/attention evidence.
fresh_bearish_fade.recommended_use: Review as potential bearish pressure or fade setup.
fresh_bearish_fade.caution: Can be countertrend if broader trend remains strong.
fresh_bearish_fade.reply_guidance: Use the archetype to frame why the asset is being discussed. Pair it with at least one score family and a caveat when signals are mixed.

sentiment_repair_ahead_of_price.definition: Sentiment momentum improves before price fully confirms, often via MACD/RSI relationship repair.
sentiment_repair_ahead_of_price.caution: Needs price confirmation; early signals can fail.
sentiment_repair_ahead_of_price.reply_guidance: Use the archetype to frame why the asset is being discussed. Pair it with at least one score family and a caveat when signals are mixed.

narrative_deterioration_despite_price_st.definition: Price remains constructive while sentiment momentum or relationship measures weaken.
narrative_deterioration_despite_price_st.recommended_use: Useful for spotting weakening participation/narrative beneath price strength.
narrative_deterioration_despite_price_st.caution: May persist during strong price trends.
narrative_deterioration_despite_price_st.reply_guidance: Use the archetype to frame why the asset is being discussed. Pair it with at least one score family and a caveat when signals are mixed.

clean_bullish_consensus.definition: Multiple signal families agree bullish with low dispersion.
clean_bullish_consensus.caution: Can still be extended; check RSI/exhaustion.
clean_bullish_consensus.reply_guidance: Use the archetype to frame why the asset is being discussed. Pair it with at least one score family and a caveat when signals are mixed.

clean_bearish_consensus.definition: Multiple signal families agree bearish with low dispersion.
clean_bearish_consensus.caution: Can be late if oversold or event is stale.
clean_bearish_consensus.reply_guidance: Use the archetype to frame why the asset is being discussed. Pair it with at least one score family and a caveat when signals are mixed.

high_attention_conflict.definition: Attention is elevated while signal families disagree or dispersion is high.
high_attention_conflict.recommended_use: Review because the market is active but direction is unresolved.
high_attention_conflict.caution: High noise; avoid over-reading a single family.
high_attention_conflict.reply_guidance: Use the archetype to frame why the asset is being discussed. Pair it with at least one score family and a caveat when signals are mixed.

watch_cluster_building.definition: Multiple watch candidates are appearing without full confirmation.
watch_cluster_building.caution: Watch is not confirmed; look for volume/volatility confirmation.
watch_cluster_building.reply_guidance: Use the archetype to frame why the asset is being discussed. Pair it with at least one score family and a caveat when signals are mixed.

overextended__exhaustion_risk.definition: Momentum or RSI is strong but potentially stretched/crowded.
overextended__exhaustion_risk.recommended_use: Use to flag risk of exhaustion or reversal.
overextended__exhaustion_risk.caution: Not necessarily bearish by itself; strong trends can stay extended.
overextended__exhaustion_risk.reply_guidance: Use the archetype to frame why the asset is being discussed. Pair it with at least one score family and a caveat when signals are mixed.

stale_confirmed_event.definition: A confirmed event exists but is no longer fresh.
stale_confirmed_event.recommended_use: Keep in history but discount current priority.
stale_confirmed_event.reply_guidance: Use the archetype to frame why the asset is being discussed. Pair it with at least one score family and a caveat when signals are mixed.

compression_coil.definition: Overlap/ribbon or volatility structure is compressed, suggesting potential energy build-up.
compression_coil.caution: Direction not established by compression alone.
compression_coil.reply_guidance: Use the archetype to frame why the asset is being discussed. Pair it with at least one score family and a caveat when signals are mixed.

quiet_neutral.definition: Few recent events, low priority, neutral/mixed signals.
quiet_neutral.recommended_use: Usually safe to ignore until something changes.
quiet_neutral.caution: May miss slow-building setups with low attention.
quiet_neutral.reply_guidance: Use the archetype to frame why the asset is being discussed. Pair it with at least one score family and a caveat when signals are mixed.

monitor.definition: Moderate priority or incomplete evidence; worth monitoring but not urgent.
monitor.recommended_use: Use as a watchlist middle state.
monitor.reply_guidance: Use the archetype to frame why the asset is being discussed. Pair it with at least one score family and a caveat when signals are mixed.

screener_attention_priority_rank.description: Rank ordering of assets by review priority.
screener_attention_priority_rank.derivation_or_logic: Calculated after scoring all assets; 1 is the highest screener_attention_priority_score.
screener_attention_priority_rank.recommended_use: Use to sort the workbook and decide which assets to review first.
screener_attention_priority_rank.cautions: Priority is review urgency, not bullishness. Pair with direction label.

term.recommended_use: Use as context, join key, filter, or supporting diagnostic.

asset_universe.derivation_or_logic: Derived from sector map, asset calendar or term classification.
asset_universe.recommended_use: Use as context, join key, filter, or supporting diagnostic.

primary_sector.derivation_or_logic: Pulled from available sector mapping where present.
primary_sector.recommended_use: Use as context, join key, filter, or supporting diagnostic.

screener_attention_priority_score.neutral_anchor: No fixed neutral; higher means review sooner
screener_attention_priority_score.description: Top-level triage score indicating how urgently an asset deserves review.
screener_attention_priority_score.derivation_or_logic: Combines absolute signal consensus, recency, latest event quality, confirmed/event activity and attention/participation. It is not bullish or bearish by itself.
screener_attention_priority_score.recommended_use: Use to sort the workbook and decide which assets to review first.
screener_attention_priority_score.cautions: Scores are model-derived interpretation aids; inspect raw values and reasons for context.

screener_action_bucket.description: Human-readable triage bucket for the asset.

screener_action_bucket.recommended_use: Use as context, join key, filter, or supporting diagnostic.
screener_action_bucket.example_values: Fresh Confirmed Event; High-Quality Watch; Monitor

primary_archetype.description: Main setup archetype assigned to the asset.
primary_archetype.derivation_or_logic: Derived from rule-based combinations of events, consensus, attention, MACD/RSI/ribbon and dispersion.
primary_archetype.recommended_use: Use for verbal summaries, dashboard cards and explanation layers.
primary_archetype.example_values: Fresh Bullish Reversal; Sentiment Repair Ahead of Price; Narrative Deterioration Despite Price Strength

secondary_archetype.description: Secondary setup archetype if another meaningful pattern also matches.
secondary_archetype.derivation_or_logic: Used to capture nuance without overriding the primary archetype.
secondary_archetype.recommended_use: Use for verbal summaries, dashboard cards and explanation layers.
secondary_archetype.example_values: Watch Cluster Building; Quiet Neutral; Overextended / Exhaustion Risk

archetype_direction.derivation_or_logic: Derived from source labels or rule-based classification.
archetype_direction.recommended_use: Use for verbal summaries, dashboard cards and explanation layers.

archetype_confidence.derivation_or_logic: Derived from source labels or rule-based classification.

archetype_summary.description: Plain-English explanation of the matched archetype.

archetype_summary.recommended_use: Use for verbal summaries, dashboard cards and explanation layers.
archetype_summary.example_values: SOL has a fresh confirmed bullish overlap event with supportive Bollinger pressure.; AVAX has a fresh confirmed bullish overlap event with supportive Bollinger pressure.; XRP has a fresh confirmed bullish overlap event with supportive Bollinger pressure.

archetype_risk_note.description: Risk or caveat associated with the archetype.
archetype_risk_note.derivation_or_logic: Highlights missing confirmation, stale signals, dispersion or exhaustion risk.
archetype_risk_note.recommended_use: Use for verbal summaries, dashboard cards and explanation layers.
archetype_risk_note.example_values: Mean-reversion/reversal setups still need price follow-through after the confirmed event.; Early repair signals are useful but less reliable until price MACD confirms.; This can be an early warning rather than an immediate breakdown signal.

screener_reason_summary.description: Plain-English reason string explaining why the asset ranked where it did.
screener_reason_summary.derivation_or_logic: Generated from active reason flags, dominant archetypes, signal state, attention and dispersion.
screener_reason_summary.recommended_use: Use for verbal summaries, dashboard cards and explanation layers.
screener_reason_summary.example_values: SOL ranked high because: fresh confirmed bullish overlap event; clustered recent overlap/watch activity; MACD family improving; low dispersion; consensus direction bullish.; AVAX ranked high because: fresh confirmed bullish overlap event; clustered recent overlap/watch activity; MACD family improving; low dispersion; consensus direction bullish.; XRP ranked high because: fresh confirmed bullish overlap event; clustered recent overlap/watch activity; MACD family improving; low dispersion; consensus direction bullish.

signal_consensus_direction_score.recommended_use: Use to understand bullish versus bearish directional bias.

signal_consensus_score_signed.derivation_or_logic: Computed from family scores as deviation from neutral. Positive is bullish, negative is bearish, 0 is neutral.

signal_consensus_score_signed.cautions: Scores are model-derived interpretation aids; inspect raw values and reasons for context.

signal_dispersion_score.description: How much the signal families disagree.
signal_dispersion_score.derivation_or_logic: Standard deviation-like dispersion across family direction scores. Low dispersion means cleaner agreement; high dispersion means a conflicted setup.
signal_dispersion_score.recommended_use: Use to separate clean setups from noisy or conflicted ones.
signal_dispersion_score.cautions: Scores are model-derived interpretation aids; inspect raw values and reasons for context.

signal_consensus_confidence_score.derivation_or_logic: Higher when dispersion is low, recent signal quality is strong, and attention confirms the direction.
signal_consensus_confidence_score.recommended_use: Use to separate clean setups from noisy or conflicted ones.
signal_consensus_confidence_score.cautions: Scores are model-derived interpretation aids; inspect raw values and reasons for context.

bollinger_direction_score.description: Neutral-centered score for active overlap/Bollinger pressure.
bollinger_direction_score.derivation_or_logic: 50 means price is mostly inside the overlap range; above 50 bullish pressure; below 50 bearish pressure. Fresh confirmed events and watch clusters push it away from 50; time decay fades it back toward 50.
bollinger_direction_score.recommended_use: Use to understand bullish versus bearish directional bias.
bollinger_direction_score.cautions: Scores are model-derived interpretation aids; inspect raw values and reasons for context.

bollinger_confidence_score.description: Confidence that the overlap/Bollinger condition is meaningful.
bollinger_confidence_score.derivation_or_logic: Built from alert tier, quality, confirmed rate, volume confirmation, recency and event clustering.
bollinger_confidence_score.recommended_use: Use to separate clean setups from noisy or conflicted ones.
bollinger_confidence_score.cautions: Scores are model-derived interpretation aids; inspect raw values and reasons for context.

bollinger_recency_decay.description: How fresh the latest Bollinger/overlap event is.
bollinger_recency_decay.derivation_or_logic: Decay multiplier used to fade event-driven Bollinger pressure back toward neutral over time.
bollinger_recency_decay.recommended_use: Use to evaluate overlap/Bollinger event pressure and confirmation quality.

bollinger_watch_cluster_score.description: Incremental score from repeated watch candidates.
bollinger_watch_cluster_score.derivation_or_logic: Counts clustered recent watch candidates so repeated developing pressure can matter without being treated like confirmed alerts.
bollinger_watch_cluster_score.recommended_use: Use to evaluate overlap/Bollinger event pressure and confirmation quality.
bollinger_watch_cluster_score.cautions: Scores are model-derived interpretation aids; inspect raw values and reasons for context.

attention_adjusted_bollinger_score.description: Bollinger direction score adjusted by participation/attention.
attention_adjusted_bollinger_score.derivation_or_logic: Keeps the pure Bollinger score separate, then buffs or nerfs it when attention/engagement confirms or contradicts the directional setup.
attention_adjusted_bollinger_score.recommended_use: Use to evaluate overlap/Bollinger event pressure and confirmation quality.
attention_adjusted_bollinger_score.cautions: Scores are model-derived interpretation aids; inspect raw values and reasons for context.

short_reply: Start with the plain-English read: bullish, bearish, mixed, early, or cautionary.
Name 1-3 drivers from Summary, MACD, RSI, Attention, Bollinger, Ribbon, Trend, archetype, or latest event.
Add one caveat if signals are mixed, early, missing, or high-dispersion.
long_reply: Open with SETA context and the asset/ticker.
Explain top drivers in order of importance.
Mention what would improve or invalidate the read.

reply_length_by_platform.bsky: 1-3 concise sentences; slightly more conversational is fine.
reply_length_by_platform.reddit: 3-6 sentences; can include more nuance and caveats.
